key_findings: Anomaly types that transfer poorly: local_outlier, ambiguous, global_outlier, cluster_boundary. These may require specialized handling during distillation.
Best transferring knowledge: isolation (72.0% retention). Worst: local_structure (57.4% retention).
High anomaly collapse rate (38.9%). Student frequently misses anomalies the teacher detected.
